ast.name: log
ast.source: Wrong repeat format, allowed are: daily, weekly, monthly, yearly. Given:

ast.name: log

ast.name: log
ast.source: %cErrors have been found in the supplied options object.
ast.target: %c在提供的选项对象中发现了错误。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tag to specify which notes to include in created timelines e.g. timeline for #timeline tag
ast.target: 用于指定要包含在创建的时间线中的笔记的标签，例如 #timeline 标签的时间线

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, events will be sorted from old to new. Turn this setting off to sort from new to old.
ast.target: 启用后，事件将按从旧到新的顺序排序。关闭此设置可按从新到旧的顺序排序。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Default: on. Adds an element to the editor status bar showing the total number
        of events in the current file. Helpful for vaults with lots of events.
ast.target: 默认：开启。在编辑器状态栏添加一个元素，显示当前文件中的事件总数。对于包含大量事件的保险库很有帮助。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, linked notes will display as a pop up when hovering over an event in the timeline.
ast.target: 启用后，将鼠标悬停在时间线上的事件上时，链接的笔记将显示为弹出窗口。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Specify the format for the date displayed in the vertical timeline. Check the docs
        for information on acceptable formatting tokens.
ast.target: 指定垂直时间线中显示的日期格式。请查阅文档了解可接受的格式标记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of frontmatter keys for start date. Example: start-date,fc-date
ast.target: 用于起始日期的 frontmatter 键的逗号分隔列表。示例：start-date,fc-date

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of frontmatter keys for end date.
ast.target: 用于结束日期的 frontmatter 键的逗号分隔列表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of frontmatter keys for title.
ast.target: 用于标题的 frontmatter 键的逗号分隔列表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
If you are having an issue or have been asked to look at the logs, turn this on to see logs in the console.
        Debug mode will default to off on plugin load and the current value will not be saved.
ast.target: 如果您遇到问题或被要求查看日志，请开启此选项以在控制台中查看日志。调试模式在插件加载时默认为关闭，且当前值不会被保存。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 垂直时间线日期显示格式

ast.name: warn

ast.target: 您已为 vis-Timeline 禁用 XSS 保护。我真心希望您知道自己在做什么！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Timeline option "throttleRedraw" is DEPRICATED and no longer supported. It will be removed in the next MAJOR release.
ast.target: 时间线选项 \"throttleRedraw\" 已弃用且不再支持。它将在下一个主要版本中移除。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Can't adhere to given 'min' range, due to zeroalign
ast.target: 由于零对齐，无法遵守给定的 'min' 范围

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Graph2d option "throttleRedraw" is DEPRICATED and no longer supported. It will be removed in the next MAJOR release.
ast.target: Graph2d 选项 \"throttleRedraw\" 已弃用且不再支持。它将在下一个主要版本中移除。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: buildHorizontalTimeline | Couldn't build the starting timeline date for the horizontal timeline
ast.target: buildHorizontalTimeline | 无法为水平时间线构建起始时间线日期

ast.name: warn
ast.source: buildHorizontalTimeline | Invalid start date - check for Month/Day values that are 0
ast.target: buildHorizontalTimeline | 无效的起始日期 - 检查月份/日期值是否为 0

ast.name: warn
ast.source: buildHorizontalTimeline | Invalid end date - check for Month/Day values that are 0
ast.target: buildHorizontalTimeline | 无效的结束日期 - 检查月份/日期值是否为 0

ast.name: warn
ast.source: parseFiles | frontmatter event does not contain 'showOnTimeline'. Skipping
ast.target: parseFiles | frontmatter 事件不包含 'showOnTimeline'。跳过

ast.name: text
ast.source:
Specify the front matter keys used to extract start dates, end dates,
         and titles for the timeline notes. Defaults to 'start-date', 'end-date', and 'title'.
ast.target: 指定用于提取时间线笔记的起始日期、结束日期和标题的 frontmatter 键。默认为 'start-date'、'end-date' 和 'title'。
